[cron:ghl-inbox-check-30m ghl-inbox-monitor] GHL INBOX CHECK: Query GHL conversations API for unread/unresponded messages in last 30 minutes. For each message: 1) Pull contact history. 2) Categorize: routine (password/access/billing) or complex (refunds/complaints). 3) For routine: draft response using templates in SOUL.md, auto-send if confidence high. 4) For complex: save draft, alert via Telegram. Return summary: messages processed, auto-responses sent, escalations flagged.
